data.title: HINGE Early Education Advisors is organizing VALUE Workshops in 2026 to assist preschool and childcare owners in determining their school's worth and developing growth and exit plans.
data.description: Early childhood education owners in the United States have the opportunity to participate in the 2026 VALUE Workshops in Greenville, South Carolina. These workshops aim to assist owners in comprehending the actual value of their schools and in devising profitable growth and exit strategies. Scheduled for January 15, 2026, the workshops provide insights for owners seeking to plan for the future of their schools and enhance their understanding of valuation concepts. Joining these workshops can facilitate early education owners in exploring strategies for growth and potential exits.

data.title: WiMi in Beijing studies quantum hybrid neural network model for image classification. (Total characters: 78)
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Beijing, tech company WiMi Research has announced its exploration of a Quantum Hybrid Neural Network Model aimed at enhancing intelligent image classification. This innovative project signifies a significant step forward in artificial intelligence research, leveraging cutting-edge technology to improve the accuracy and efficiency of image recognition systems. The development highlights WiMi's commitment to pushing the boundaries of AI, showcasing their dedication to staying at the forefront of technological advancements. This initiative holds promise for revolutionizing image analysis processes, potentially transforming various industries.

data.title: Study shows TIAA Traditional Annuity outperformed in over 90% of scenarios, leading to $89,000 larger estate balances.
data.description: A recent study found that in the majority of instances, retirement funds which had a portion of their assets reallocated from bonds to other investments could have resulted in larger account balances upon retirement, offering more guaranteed income per dollar, and averaging around $89,000 higher estate balances. This insightful research provides valuable information for individuals planning for their retirement, highlighting the potential benefits of adjusting asset allocations in retirement funds for improved financial outcomes.

data.title: Oligo Security names Shira Bendkowski as VP of Product to boost innovation for customers. Bendkowski, with experience at Aqua Security, will drive product strategy.
data.description: Oligo Security, a leading runtime security company based in Tel Aviv, Israel, has welcomed Shira Bendkowski as the Vice President of Product. In her new role, Bendkowski will be responsible for shaping the product vision and overseeing its implementation to introduce fresh, cutting-edge features to Oligo's growing customer network. With a strong background in driving product strategy and fostering innovation within prominent players in the cybersecurity industry, Bendkowski's previous position was as the VP of Product at Aqua Security. Her appointment signifies a strategic move by Oligo Security to enhance its offerings and cater to the evolving needs of its expanding clientele.

data.title: Jumex® introduces GoMix™ gummies to U.S. retailers, expanding beyond beverages for the first time.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Los Angeles, Jumex®, a well-known brand recognized for providing real fruit drinks to numerous homes, disclosed its venture into new territory by introducing Jumex GoMix™ gummies. This expansion into chewy candy represents a significant step forward for the brand, showcasing its commitment to diversifying its product offerings.
SENATOR WYDEN ADDS BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON TO EPSTEIN PROBE

data.title: Gray Oak Power launches in Houston offering firm power solutions for US data centers to stabilize and accelerate development.
data.description: Gray Oak Power has been established with a primary goal of assisting data center developers and owners in the United States to expedite their operations. By providing on-site, reliable power infrastructure, Gray Oak Power allows data centers to stabilize their facilities years before connecting to utility services. The company was launched on January 15, 2026, in Houston. This innovative approach aims to bring benefits to data centers across the US by ensuring a smooth and efficient operation process.

data.title: Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) completes 1-for-5 reverse stock split, aiming to restructure stock value.
data.description: Amcor plc, a top global company specializing in responsible packaging solutions, disclosed its successful completion of a 1-for-5 reverse stock split. This strategic move, approved by Amcor's management, aims to enhance shareholder value. Trading under the tickers NYSE: AMCR and ASX: AMC, Amcor continues to solidify its position as an influential player in the industry.

data.title: Stoli Group's U.S. entities, Stoli Group USA, LLC and Kentucky Owl LLC, are converting from Chapter 11 to Chapter 7 bankruptcy.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 15, 2026, Stoli Group revealed that its American entities, Stoli Group USA, LLC and Kentucky Owl LLC, have submitted a request to transition from Chapter 11 to Chapter 7. This move will involve the transfer of supervision for these entities to a trustee assigned by the court. The decision suggests a significant change in the management of the U.S. branches of Stoli Group, marking a shift in the control structure of the businesses.

data.title: Bank of America, Citi, JPMorgan, and Wells Fargo all report lower earnings amid threat of credit card rate cap by President Trump.
data.description: This week, major financial institutions Bank of America, Citi, JPMorgan, and Wells Fargo all reported challenging earnings results against the backdrop of President Trump's proposed cap on credit card rates. The uncertainty surrounding this issue has weighed heavily on the banking sector, with many investors closely watching how these influential banks navigate through this challenging period.

data.title: Introducing vyv™: Personalized vitamins for women, tailored daily packs, expert support, and focus on energy and hormones.
data.description: In Snoqualmie, Washington on January 15, 2026, vyv™ launched a new approach to women's wellness with personalized daily packs, expert support, and nutrition aimed at addressing energy, focus, hormones, and real-life challenges. Recognizing the common struggle of starting a wellness routine only to abandon it by week three, vyv™ offers a solution. This program provides tailored daily packs and expert guidance to help women stay on track with their wellness goals.

data.title: Morgan Stanley reports strong Q4 earnings, with $2.68 EPS, $4.397 billion net earnings, 38% stock surge, revenue of $17.89 billion, 18% YoY increase. CEO highlights growth and momentum.
data.description: In the latest financial report, Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) announced fourth-quarter 2025 earnings of $2.68 per share, showing an increase from $2.22 in the previous year and surpassing the estimated $2.41. Net earnings rose by 18% year over year to reach $4.397 billion. The company's stock has seen a remarkable 38% surge over the past year. The CEO and chairman, Ted Pick, expressed satisfaction with the performance and attributed it to strategic investments made over several years that have contributed to growth and momentum across the Integrated Firm. Morgan Stanley's revenue for 2025 stood at $17.89 billion, marking a 10% increase from the previous year and surpassing the consensus estimate of $17.77 billion. The expense efficiency ratio in 2025 was 68%, an improvement from 71% in the prior year, reflecting operational efficiency while maintaining investment in various sectors. The Return on Tangible Common Equity (ROTCE) was reported at 21.6% in 2025, up from 18.8% in the previous year. The company's Standardized Common Equity Tier 1 ratio...
